documentation.file_docstring: MIME types compatible with voice messages. Telegram sendVoice supports OGG/Opus, MP3, and M4A. https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#sendvoice
inline_comments: Backward-compatible alias used across plugin/runtime call sites. Keeps existing behavior while making Telegram-specific policy explicit.

functions.name: isVoiceCompatibleAudio
functions.doc: Backward-compatible alias used across plugin call sites.   Keeps existing behavior while making Telegram-specific policy
